XHS.HOOK.LIFECYCLE.REGISTER.name: Plugin Registration
XHS.HOOK.LIFECYCLE.REGISTER.description: Executed when the plugin is first added to the server.

XHS.HOOK.LIFECYCLE.SERVER_START.name: Server Startup
XHS.HOOK.LIFECYCLE.SERVER_START.description: Executed during the initial phase of server startup.

XHS.HOOK.LIFECYCLE.SERVER_READY.name: Server Ready Alert
XHS.HOOK.LIFECYCLE.SERVER_READY.action: execute logic after the server is fully ready
XHS.HOOK.LIFECYCLE.SERVER_READY.description: Executed once the server is listening for connections.

XHS.HOOK.LIFECYCLE.SERVER_STOP.name: Server Shutdown
XHS.HOOK.LIFECYCLE.SERVER_STOP.description: Executed when the server is closing down.

XHS.HOOK.HTTP.REQUEST.name: Request Interception
XHS.HOOK.HTTP.REQUEST.description: Executed for every incoming HTTP request.

XHS.HOOK.HTTP.RESPONSE.name: Response Interception
XHS.HOOK.HTTP.RESPONSE.description: Executed just before the response is sent to the client.

XHS.HOOK.HTTP.ERROR.name: Error Handling
XHS.HOOK.HTTP.ERROR.description: Executed when an unhandled error occurs during a request.

XHS.HOOK.SECURITY.ATTACK.name: Security Attack Monitoring
XHS.HOOK.SECURITY.ATTACK.action: monitor and respond to security threats
XHS.HOOK.SECURITY.ATTACK.description: Executed when a potential security attack is detected.

XHS.HOOK.SECURITY.RATE_LIMIT.name: Rate Limit Tracking
XHS.HOOK.SECURITY.RATE_LIMIT.description: Executed when a client exceeds request rate limits.

XHS.HOOK.METRICS.RESPONSE_TIME.name: Performance Monitoring
XHS.HOOK.METRICS.RESPONSE_TIME.description: Provides performance data for every completed request.

XHS.HOOK.METRICS.ROUTE_ERROR.name: Route Error Tracking
XHS.HOOK.METRICS.ROUTE_ERROR.description: Executed when a specific route execution fails.

XHS.PERM.ROUTING.REGISTER_ROUTES.name: API Route Registration
XHS.PERM.ROUTING.REGISTER_ROUTES.description: Allows the plugin to add new routes to the application.

XHS.PERM.HTTP.MIDDLEWARE.name: Middleware Injection
XHS.PERM.HTTP.MIDDLEWARE.action: inject scoped middleware into the pipe
XHS.PERM.HTTP.MIDDLEWARE.description: Allows the plugin to add middleware to the request flow.

XHS.PERM.ROUTING.BYPASS_NAMESPACE.name: Namespace Bypass
XHS.PERM.ROUTING.BYPASS_NAMESPACE.action: register routes outside of its own namespace
XHS.PERM.ROUTING.BYPASS_NAMESPACE.description: Privileged: Allows a plugin to register routes on paths that don't start with its own ID.

XHS.PERM.ROUTING.OVERWRITE_PROTECTED.name: Route Overwrite
XHS.PERM.ROUTING.OVERWRITE_PROTECTED.action: overwrite existing system or plugin routes
XHS.PERM.ROUTING.OVERWRITE_PROTECTED.description: Privileged: Allows a plugin to replace an already registered route (high risk).

XHS.PERM.HTTP.GLOBAL_MIDDLEWARE.name: Global Middleware
XHS.PERM.HTTP.GLOBAL_MIDDLEWARE.action: inject global middleware affecting all routes
XHS.PERM.HTTP.GLOBAL_MIDDLEWARE.description: Privileged: Allows a plugin to register middleware that applies to every request on the server.

PLG.MANAGEMENT.MANAGE_PLUGINS.name: Plugin Orchestration
PLG.MANAGEMENT.MANAGE_PLUGINS.description: Privileged: Allows a plugin to influence other plugins in the system.

XHS.PERM.OPS.AUXILIARY_SERVER.name: Auxiliary Server Deployment
XHS.PERM.OPS.AUXILIARY_SERVER.description: Privileged: Allows creating independent servers (e.g., Swagger, Admin Panel).

XHS.PERM.LOGGING.CONSOLE_INTERCEPT.name: Console Logging Interception
XHS.PERM.LOGGING.CONSOLE_INTERCEPT.description: Privileged: Allows the plugin to capture all console activity.

XHS.PERM.SECURITY.CONFIGS.name: Server Configuration Access
XHS.PERM.SECURITY.CONFIGS.description: Privileged: Allows reading sensitive server settings and environmental data.

XHS.PERM.SECURITY.SENSITIVE_DATA.name: Sensitive Request Data Access
XHS.PERM.SECURITY.SENSITIVE_DATA.action: read sensitive request data like body, query, and cookies
XHS.PERM.SECURITY.SENSITIVE_DATA.description: Privileged: Allows reading unmasked request data containing potentially sensitive information (PII, tokens, etc).
